scripts.expose: trap 'kill 0' EXIT; npx serve -l 8080 -s . & ngrok http 8080 > /dev/null & until curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:4040/api/tunnels 2>/dev/null | grep -q public_url; do sleep 0.2; done; URL=$(curl -s http://127.0.0.1:4040/api/tunnels | node -pe 'JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync(0,"utf8")).tunnels[0].public_url'); printf %s "$URL" | pbcopy; echo "Copied: $URL"; open "$URL" https://simkl.com/settings/developer/edit/61491 https://trakt.tv/oauth/applications/195099/edit; wait
